nodes.label: Batched In-Process MLIR Transform
nodes.rationale: Instead of calling action.apply() per action (which spawned a process to parse the model from scratch every time), compile one combined transform script and interpret it in-process. Reduced GPT-2 optimization time from 25h to 2-3 minutes.

nodes.label: Bufferization and Lowering Fallback Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Three-level execution pipeline: 1) bindings execution (300s cap); 2) multiprocess bindings (7200s); 3) mlir-opt subprocess + mlir-cpu-runner execution (7200s) to handle complex bufferization timeout/crashing patterns.
